ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the workclass of the individual */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight (fnlwgt) used in the survey */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the highest level of education completed by the individual */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Numeric code representing the education level */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the relationship status of the individual */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race of the individual */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked per week */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the native country of the individual */,
  "gross_income_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gross income category of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the individual */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the individual resides */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the individual resides */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the individual's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the record for data integrity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES native_countries ("native_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_gross_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("gross_income_id") REFERENCES gross_incomes ("gross_income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the workclass (e.g., State-gov, Self-emp-not-inc) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., Bachelors, HS-grad) */,
  "education_code" INTEGER /* Numeric code representing the education level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status (e.g., Never-married, Married-civ-spouse) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Adm-clerical, Exec-managerial) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship status */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship status (e.g., Not-in-family, Husband) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racial category */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the racial category (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country */,
  "native_country_name" TEXT /* Name of the native country (e.g., United-States, Cuba) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("native_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gross_incomes" (
  "gross_income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gross income category */,
  "gross_income_name" TEXT /* Name of the gross income category (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gross_income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_categories" (
  "income_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income category */,
  "income_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the income category */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Range of income for the category (e.g., 0-25K, 25K-50K) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic profile */,
  "profile_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic profile */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the profile */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the native country */,
  "gross_income_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gross income category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is active */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Estimated population count for the profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_profiles_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES native_countries ("native_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_profiles_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_profiles_gross_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("gross_income_id") REFERENCES gross_incomes ("gross_income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_profiles_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_profiles_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labor_market_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each labor market analysis */,
  "analysis_name" TEXT /* Name of the labor market analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was conducted */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  "job_growth" REAL /* Job growth rate */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is active */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the external data source used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labor_market_analyses_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labor_market_analyses_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is active */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the record is active */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)
